textByHash.659bbb67fb0a9cc58c011fef0e9d06b33aeff5e8: Hello, human. Are you enjoying your time in Port Roberts.
textByHash.9f1b7130da11a4dfe8a118d8037b026acb10f705: Yes, very much so. I find it to be a fun place to take a break and just watch the world go by. There's always ships coming and going and always plenty of people to meet. There's also a lot you can learn here.
textByHash.c8c5ff8b2fc71505524558afbf72d682d6896ab9: Well, if you haven't already, you should speak to Kellan in the pub. He knows everything there is to know about deep sea trawling.
